features: Added the ability to download in PDF format, as well as adding the type of report to download to the file name.
Fix in the API query for unknown datasets.
Added OTA Update System with direct GitHub Tarball download.
Fixed Setup Wizard skip button logic.
Redesigned sidebar for all Cortex tools to a compact 260px width.
Introduced GitHub PAT integration for Content Importer.
Added smart logic to handle missing .git folders in Docker.
